name: Cherry Cheese-Cake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Drain cherries and reserve 1/4 cup liquid. In a large bowl, combine sugar and cornstarch. Add lemon juice and almond extract. Stir in the reserved cherry liquid and pitted cherries. Pour into the unbaked pie shell.
3. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
4. For topping, beat cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and vanilla until well blended. Spread over hot cherry filling. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 25 minutes. Cool to room temperature before serving.
